Now Hiring – Vijayawada

Medical Representative Jobs in Vijayawada

Crasenim Pharma is hiring experienced Medical Representatives, commission-based field sales, and pharma marketing professionals in Vijayawada — AP's commercial capital. Build your pharmaceutical career with a WHO GMP certified brand across the high-density Krishna district prescription market.

📍 Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh 💼 Full-Time + Commission Roles 🏆 2–5 Years Experience Preferred ✅ WHO GMP Brand
💬 Apply via WhatsApp View All Openings
Territory

MR Territory in Vijayawada & Krishna District

Vijayawada is AP's busiest commercial city and one of the highest-prescription-density pharma markets in the entire coastal belt. An MR here operates across a mix of corporate hospitals, private nursing homes, multi-speciality clinics, and a dense network of independent general practitioners.

The territory typically covers Vijayawada city (One Town, Patamata, Benz Circle, Governorpet) and may extend to Machilipatnam, Gudivada, or Nuzvid depending on allocation. Products like Telsenim-40 and Metsenim-G perform strongly here due to the high prevalence of hypertension and type 2 diabetes in this urban population.

Key Market Areas in Vijayawada

One Town, Patamata, Benz Circle, Governorpet, Vijayawada New Bus Stand area; Extended: Machilipatnam, Gudivada, Nuzvid, Gannavaram

Vijayawada Pharma Market Opportunity

High specialist density, major private hospital chains, and one of the strongest chain-pharmacy markets in AP. Senior MRs with existing Vijayawada doctor relationships will find this a high-earning territory.

  • AP's commercial capital — highest per-capita prescription volume on coast
  • Strong demand for cardiac, diabetic, and gastric medications
  • Large hospital sector (KIMS, Medicover, Ramnath, Rainbow)
  • Dense independent GP base across multiple city zones
  • Growing chain pharmacy penetration for wellness and OTC products
Current Openings

Pharma Job Vacancies in Vijayawada

Medical Representative – Vijayawada
📍 Vijayawada, Krishna District💼 Full-Time🕒 1–3 Years
Now Hiring
  • Detail WHO GMP certified Crasenim Pharma brands to GPs and specialists in Vijayawada
  • Cover defined territory with regular doctor visits and prescription follow-ups
  • Monthly target achievement with attractive incentive structure
  • Base salary + travel allowance + performance bonus
Senior MR / Area Sales Support – Vijayawada
📍 Vijayawada / Krishna District💼 Full-Time🕒 3–6 Years
Now Hiring
  • Manage key hospital and corporate accounts in Vijayawada city
  • Lead territory expansion into Machilipatnam and Gudivada sub-markets
  • Support junior MR onboarding and joint field visits
  • Competitive CTC + growth path to Area Sales Manager role
Commission-Based Field Sales – Vijayawada
📍 Vijayawada / NTR District💼 Commission / Part-Time🕒 Any Experience
Now Hiring
  • Earn commission on prescriptions generated for Crasenim Pharma in Vijayawada
  • No investment required — promote our brands as a side business or primary role
  • NTR District and surrounding areas also covered under this role
  • Monthly incentives and bonuses for consistent target delivery
FAQs

Pharma Jobs in Vijayawada – FAQ

What experience is needed for MR jobs in Vijayawada?
For full-time roles, 2–5 years of pharma field sales experience in Vijayawada or Krishna district is preferred, particularly with existing specialist doctor relationships. Commission-based roles are open to candidates at any level.
What is the salary range for Medical Representatives in Vijayawada?
Salaries depend on experience. Full-time MRs typically receive a base salary in the range of ₹18,000–₹40,000/month plus travel allowance and performance incentives. Commission-based roles earn purely on prescription achievement. Contact us for specific current package details.
Does Crasenim Pharma also cover NTR District from the Vijayawada office?
Yes. The Vijayawada territory can extend to cover parts of NTR District including Tiruvuru and Jagannadhapuram depending on your experience and preference.
How do I apply for a pharma job in Vijayawada?
WhatsApp your name and experience to +91 99890 74806, or submit the application form on our Careers page. Our team responds within 2 working days.

Ready to Start Your Pharma Career in Vijayawada?

Apply now for Medical Representative and commission-based field sales roles in Vijayawada and NTR District.
